content.title: MD to PDF Converter
content.short_description: A modern web-based tool that converts Markdown files to professional PDF format with clean styling and instant processing.
content.description: I designed and built the complete Markdown to PDF Converter application from scratch, implementing the full frontend interface with React and TypeScript, creating the markdown-to-HTML conversion API endpoint, and developing sophisticated client-side PDF generation using browser print functionality. I engineered advanced features including toggleable page breaks with multiple implementation methods, custom diagonal watermarks with single or tiled patterns, and responsive print styling that ensures consistent typography across all paper sizes.
content.role: As the sole developer of this project, I designed and built the complete Markdown to PDF Converter application from the ground up. I implemented the full frontend interface using React and TypeScript, created the markdown-to-HTML conversion system using Marked.js, and developed sophisticated client-side PDF generation using browser print functionality. I engineered advanced features including toggleable page breaks with multiple implementation methods, custom diagonal watermarks with single or tiled patterns, and responsive print styling that ensures consistent typography across all paper sizes. I also managed the complete deployment process to Netlify and optimized the application for performance and user privacy with client-side processing.

achievements: Successfully deployed live application with instant PDF conversion capabilities
Implemented complete client-side processing ensuring user privacy - no data leaves the browser
Created professional PDF output with responsive typography that scales properly across A4, A3, Tabloid and other paper sizes
Developed advanced watermark system supporting both single centered and tiled 6×6 grid patterns with custom text
Built comprehensive page break control supporting HTML style attributes, CSS classes, and horizontal rule methods
technologies: Tailwind CSS v4 for modern styling
Client-side PDF generation using browser print API
Responsive design with glassmorphism UI patterns
Print media queries and CSS typography optimization

screenshots: Main converter interface showing markdown input area and settings panel
Settings panel demonstrating page break and watermark toggle controls
PDF output example showing professional typography and watermark placement
Mobile responsive design showing interface adaptation
